title: House Jambalaya
notes:
A bold, one-pot rice dinner loaded with sausage, chicken, and shrimp.
Best served right from the Dutch oven.

Chef's Notes:
Remove the bay leaves before serving.
Taste and add more hot sauce if needed.
ingredients: 1 lb andouille sausage, sliced into rounds
1 lb boneless skinless chicken thighs, diced
instructions: Brown the sausage in a Dutch oven; transfer to a bowl.
Add the chicken and cook until lightly browned.
Stir in the onion, bell pepper, celery, and garlic until softened.
Return the sausage to the pot with the rice, tomatoes, stock, Cajun seasoning, thyme, and bay leaves.
Cover and simmer until the rice is tender.
Fold in the shrimp and cook just until opaque.
